transcript.text:
[Today's eats: Pork Back Ribs]
[During a peaceful mukbang...]
[A sudden challenge?!]
[He doubts her]
[Let's eat a hundred of them then!]
[A mukbang mission out of nowhere]
[He's watching you]
[A battle with 100 back ribs]
[This won't be easy]
[Just give up]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Dapsimni-dong today
A writer worker of mine told me about this pork back rib place that she really enjoyed
I've never had pork back ribs for mukbang
So I'm here to devour some pork ribs today
[Il Gwang Jjok Galbi] [Seoul Teuk Byeol-si, Dongdaemun-gu]

Hello sir, Wow!
[Stone-grill?]
Yes, Elvan-Stone
Interesting!
What's on your menu?
We have 1 item
Just jjok-galbi? (pork ribs)
Order from the chef
20 servings, please
No, you can't
How in the world are you going to eat 20 servings?
[20 servings, please!]
[Negotiated down to 100 ribs]
[Let's get to work!]
[Elvan stone grilled Jjok Galbi] (Pork Back Ribs)
[With their signature sauce]

[Cook into perfection]
[This is going to take a while]
I don't think she can finish it
If it's too much, I will to-go it for you after you finish filming
[Don't worry, there won't be any leftovers]
[Jjok Galbi is here!]
Thank you
5 out of 7 plates are served
I'll start before they get cold
I usually wait for everything, but I can't this time
Bon appetit
This is all they have on the menu Not even a spicy one available
[All the meat off the bones]
[Don't forget the side dishes]
-What's this? -It's a dipping sauce
Thank you

I'm going to be a messy eater today
Wow, the seasoning
I thought it was taste bland from the looks of it
But it's not It's seasoned really well
My clothes will get dirty today too
100 of them?
I don't think it will be enough
The meat off the bones are chewy and delicious
With the dipping sauce
It's a refreshing sauce for when it feels too greasy
What kind of sauce is this?
Wasabi sauce
Try this dipping sauce
I make the sauces myself
[It's the best]
-Thank you -Enjoy your meal

Tasty
It's fun to stack the bones
It's coming
Thank you
[There's still 1 more plate coming...]
Should I try the red sauce now?
I wonder what it is
I thought it was Chojang (red chili sauce with vinegar)
That's spicy!
It's like a mix of Chojang and Gochujang sauce (red chili paste)
I can taste the gochujang
[Who are you...]
Very spicy
It has an addicting flavor
I'm almost finished with 1 plate already
[How?]

These are not burnt, but it tastes scorched
Like right before it gets burnt
So good
[And for the last plate!]
What's the similarities of Deung Galbi and Jjok Galbi?
They're the same
The same?
Except we chop up these pork back ribs just like this
It's so good
These are all local pork ribs So they were never frozen
That's probably why it's so good
This is very spicy
It's something that will relieve stress
Just like a harmonica
You set it up nicely
You're a smart one

Some kimchi He said that the kimchi is delicious too
Their kimchi is good
It melts in my mouth Very soft
Yummy
Even Moon Seyoon (comedian) wouldn't dare to challenge this
Can you do this challenge?
I can do it!
I don't think you can
[It just became a 100-ribs mukbang challenge]
[Louder!]
Thank you
It's a challenge mukbang now
That's not why I came here though But it's okay
This calls for some soju
1 plate down
All the bones in here

Enjoy~
[Lets out a big sigh]
[You're going to need more of these]
Thank you
[Yes, she'll need 3 of those]
She's pretty and eats well
[Yes, most of the time...]
What is your name?
Tzuyang
Zooyang?
Tzu Tzu!
Very unique
Not my real name Just a nickname
How did you end up doing this challenge?
She's not doing a challenge
But it seems like it

[Please edit that out...]
Some kimchi
[2 plates down!]
[Shall we get started with the meal now?]
[Stew that comes with the meal]
Tastes like bean sprout soup
I must be the only person not drinking while eating here
Egg, soft tofu,
Like a sour bean sprout soup?
It's perfect when the food feels greasy
It goes well together
[3 plates down...]
4 plates left still
15 ribs each plate
10 left here
He took 1 plate to re-heat the meat

[Let's get back to eating~]
A lot of side menus are available at Korean BBQ restaurants
But this place only serves this meat
Thank you
It's hot
Should I use chopsticks?
I'll use the tools
So tasty
I usually just eat the meat cold because it doesn't taste as good after re-heating it
But these still taste fresh
I love it
Thank you
So 4 over here
I'm at 67 ribs now
67 ribs,
1 garlic

[Finishing up her 5th plate of ribs]
That was quick Thank you
[Will re-heat the last one in a bit too]
It's still very delicious
I thought 100 of these would be difficult
But it's easier than I thought
I think I can eat 200 ribs
85th
This place has good ribs because it's all they serve
It's the perfect place to grab some drinks
The ribs are very tender and tasty
But I think the customers come here because they're so nice
Their friendliness and accommodation doubles the taste
I wonder how many cans of coke I drink on average
[Let's see...]
I drink a lot of sodas

I drink more at home
I spend a lot of money on sodas
Over 200,000 Won in sodas every time (~$155 USD)
[You are the best]
[Embarrassed]
-A KPOP idol came last time -Oh yeah, that's right
2 of them
And had 15~20 servings
And now, Tzuyang!
[Double thumbs up]
[Now for the last plate]
1 last piece
[Around 20 servings of pork back ribs] [100 pieces cleared!]
Wow this, It's yummy
100, success!
[A professional mukbanger that won't leave anything behind]

I got a cramp
It's fine now
[Stop eating]
Thanks everyone
[The friendly chef's shy thumbs-up]
The drinks are on the house
No no, it's really okay
What kind of exercise do you do?
Exercise? I don't...
[What the...]
Sir, I finished!
Give me a fist bump!
Hopefully I will see you again
Yes, I will be back
-Thank you for the meal -Thank you, stay healthy
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
